trivia_bullets.text: Part of a 20-card cycle of Enchantment Creature — Nightmare cards spanning DSK and DSC, each representing a distinct human fear. Mark Rosewater: "Set Design, working with Creative, made a series of creatures that represent different types of fears, all with the creature type Nightmare."
sources: Wizards of the Coast: 'Top of the Duskmourning, Part 1'
Gatherer DSK+DSC Fear of search (20 results confirmed)

trivia_bullets.text: Flavor text speaker is Zimone Wola — Quandrix College prodigy from Strixhaven, trapped in Duskmourn's vast shifting library during the set's story. Her academic anxiety literalized as a nightmare creature.
sources: MTG Wiki: Zimone Wola (via WebSearch snippet)

trivia_bullets.text: Costs {4}{U}, 2/7 Enchantment Creature. The 7 toughness provides exceptional blocking; combat damage trigger draws cards equal to damage dealt. EDHREC rank 12,076 indicating modest Commander adoption.
Art by Jana Heidersdorf. Hipsters of the Coast described Heidersdorf as having "enchanting and ethereal" work in a 2022 artist spotlight context. This is among her DSK contributions.
sources: Hipstersofthecoast.com: 'My 2022 Magic Artist Wishlist, Part I' (via WebSearch snippet)
